_meta.description: Committed seed pricing config for Perkins Roofing (tenant 1) — all three branches (miami, jupiter, naples). Null values are pending Tim confirmation; engine raises ConfigError on null access.
tim_verify_open_items: OI-1: low_slope.base_cost_lm — ALL cells null; Tim must supply Exhibit B §4 base costs for TPO/coatings/silicone/BUR in both zones (blocks low-slope path)
OI-2: low_slope.overhead — ALL cells null; Tim must supply per-type OH for flat/TPO/coatings in both zones
OI-3: low_slope.insulation_tiers — empty; Tim must supply tiered insulation cost-per-sq breakpoints
OI-4: low_slope.tapered_cost_per_sq — null; Tim must supply tapered polyiso cost per sq
OI-5: low_slope.deck_types.plywood_replace — null; Tim must supply plywood deck replacement adder
OI-6: low_slope.tear_off_per_layer_per_sq — null; Tim must supply per-layer tear-off cost per sq
OI-7: commission_pct.sloped_hvhz — null; Tim must confirm whether sloped HVHZ jobs use 10% (sloped) or 15% (low_slope) rate (PC-1)
OI-8: pm_incentive — full matrix needs Tim verification before activation (PC matrix per PRD F2-11; current values from plan §10.5)
OI-9: boundary_inclusive_lower / boundary_exclusive_upper — presumed lower-inclusive/upper-exclusive per Exhibit B wording (PC-2); config flag means answer is a data change only
OI-10: tile_dumpster_boundary_inclusive — default true; Tim to confirm (Adv-1 per PRD)

_pending_boundary: Tim — PC-2: confirm lower-inclusive/upper-exclusive sliding-scale boundary rule (OI-9)

commission_pct._pending_sloped_hvhz: Tim — PC-1: confirm sloped HVHZ commission rate (10% same as sloped, or 15% same as low_slope); engine defaults to sloped (0.10) until this is filled (OI-7)

pm_incentive._pending_verify: Tim — full matrix must be verified before activation (OI-8); values from PRD F2-11 plan §10.5

_pending_tile_dumpster_boundary: Tim — Adv-1: confirm whether threshold boundary SQ itself triggers next dumpster (default true = inclusive) (OI-10)

HVHZ._pending_tpo_hvhz: Tim — Exhibit B §4: TPO base cost per sq in HVHZ zone (OI-1)
HVHZ._pending_coatings_hvhz: Tim — Exhibit B §4: coatings base cost per sq in HVHZ zone (OI-1)
HVHZ._pending_silicone_hvhz: Tim — Exhibit B §4: silicone base cost per sq in HVHZ zone (OI-1)
HVHZ._pending_bur_hvhz: Tim — Exhibit B §4: BUR base cost per sq in HVHZ zone (OI-1)

FBC._pending_tpo_fbc: Tim — Exhibit B §4: TPO base cost per sq in FBC zone (OI-1)
FBC._pending_coatings_fbc: Tim — Exhibit B §4: coatings base cost per sq in FBC zone (OI-1)
FBC._pending_silicone_fbc: Tim — Exhibit B §4: silicone base cost per sq in FBC zone (OI-1)
FBC._pending_bur_fbc: Tim — Exhibit B §4: BUR base cost per sq in FBC zone (OI-1)

HVHZ._pending_flat_oh_hvhz: Tim — Exhibit B §4: flat/BUR overhead per sq HVHZ (OI-2)
HVHZ._pending_tpo_oh_hvhz: Tim — Exhibit B §4: TPO overhead per sq HVHZ (OI-2)
HVHZ._pending_coatings_oh_hvhz: Tim — Exhibit B §4: coatings overhead per sq HVHZ (OI-2)

FBC._pending_flat_oh_fbc: Tim — Exhibit B §4: flat/BUR overhead per sq FBC (OI-2)
FBC._pending_tpo_oh_fbc: Tim — Exhibit B §4: TPO overhead per sq FBC (OI-2)
FBC._pending_coatings_oh_fbc: Tim — Exhibit B §4: coatings overhead per sq FBC (OI-2)

low_slope._pending_insulation_tiers: Tim — Exhibit B §4: insulation tier breakpoints as [[max_sq, cost_per_sq], ...]; no profit added per Exhibit B (OI-3)
low_slope._pending_tapered_cost_per_sq: Tim — Exhibit B §4: tapered polyiso cost per sq; no OH or profit per Exhibit B (OI-4)

deck_types._pending_plywood_replace: Tim — Exhibit B §4: plywood deck replacement adder per sq (OI-5)

low_slope._pending_tear_off_per_layer_per_sq: Tim — Exhibit B §4: per-layer tear-off cost per sq (OI-6)
